name: Neem Oil (Cold-Pressed)
description: A vegetable oil from the seeds of the neem tree containing azadirachtin, which disrupts insect feeding, mating, and molting while exhibiting antifungal properties.
chemicalName: Complex mixture of triglycerides and limonoids; primary bioactive: azadirachtin
appearance: Yellow to dark brown liquid; strong garlic/sulfur-like odor
solubility: Insoluble in water (must be emulsified with soap)
chemistry: Azadirachtin disrupts insect feeding/mating/eggs. Antifungal. Spares beneficials when applied evening.
warnings: Emulsify with soap. Evening only. Strong smell.
